Export scraped datasets, run the scraper via API, schedule and monitor runs or integrate with other tools.

data.readmeSummary:
## Instagram Comment Scraper

Instagram Comment Scraper extracts comments and nested replies from Instagram posts, producing structured comment records that include comment text, timestamps, commenter profile metadata (username, verification status, profile picture), engagement metadata (likes and reply counts), comment and post identifiers, comment position, and comment permalinks. The Actor captures full conversation threads (comments and replies) and metadata useful for sentiment analysis, time-series engagement analysis, conversation-thread analysis, brand and competitor monitoring, and other text- and signals-based analytics.

## Use cases

- Sentiment analysis on marketing campaigns and promotional content  
- Tracking audience engagement and engagement patterns over time  
- Monitoring brand mentions, customer feedback, and public reception  
- Detecting misinformation, abuse, or toxic content in comment threads  
- Analyzing competitor content performance and audience reaction  
- Capturing full conversation threads by extracting replies for thread-level analysis  
- Gathering commenter profile metadata and verification status for audience or influencer profiling  
- Using comment timestamps and positions to study visibility and engagement order
